title: Stories of Impact from the drought tolerant crops value chain
abstract:
The stories contained in this document are an elaboration of
the impact of the three years’ work of this project. This work
has been made possible by the financial support of USAIDKEA and collaboration of many partners who have worked
closely with ICRISAT and the staff of County Governments
to interact with the famers, traders and all stakeholders
in the whole value chain development process to achieve
these impacts.
keywords: Feed the Future Kenya Accelerated Value Chain Development Program (AVCD)
